title: PostgreSQL persistence + Admin dashboard
changes: Entries and sentence tags now saved to PostgreSQL (Cloud SQL-ready) in addition to Weaviate
PostgreSQL service added to docker-compose with persistent volume
Admin dashboard at /admin — protected by username/password
Admin dashboard shows eval results, LangFuse traces, cache stats, and release notes
CHANGELOG tracking added

title: Phase 3: Model router + semantic cache
changes: Model routing: classifier and summarizer use gpt-4o-mini (Tier 1), entity extractor and intent detector use gpt-4o (Tier 2)
In-memory semantic cache — skips LLM calls for near-duplicate entries (cosine similarity threshold: 0.95)
Cache stats exposed on GET /health
model_used and cache_hits tracked per pipeline run and stored with entry

title: Phase 2: LangFuse prompt management + agent pipeline
changes: All 4 agents wired to real GPT-4o calls with LangFuse tracing
Prompt management: prompts registered in LangFuse, fetched at runtime with local fallback
3-dot menu on entries: edit and delete inline
Month separator headings in entry list
Redesigned result card: summary, per-sentence breakdown, entity chips
Mobile-friendly layout with bottom nav tab switching
Fixed categories display bug (was showing 'other other other' for past entries)

title: Phase 1: Core loop
changes: FastAPI skeleton with /ingest/text, /ingest/audio, /entries routes
LangGraph pipeline: entity extractor → classifier → intent detector → summarizer
Weaviate vector store for long-term memory and semantic search
PostgreSQL schema (SQLAlchemy ORM): entries, events, sentence_tags, eval_runs
Docker Compose: API + Weaviate + frontend
React + Vite frontend with text entry, audio recorder, entry list, entry detail
